mapper.sql: ModelNo, QtyOpenning, QtyOnHand, QtyImport, QtyExport, QtyPrepare, InDate, OutDate, StockCode, OrdMinQty, CustomerNo, LocationNo, Inserttime, ParentCode
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from dbo.mig_Inventory_agent
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from dbo.mig_Inventory_agent
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.mig_Inventory_agent (ModelNo, QtyOpenning, QtyOnHand, QtyImport, QtyExport, QtyPrepare, InDate, OutDate, StockCode, OrdMinQty, CustomerNo, LocationNo, Inserttime, ParentCode, OptRec ) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{locationno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{parentcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optrec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.mig_Inventory_agent
ModelNo,
QtyOpenning,
QtyOnHand,
QtyImport,
QtyExport,
QtyPrepare,
InDate,
OutDate,
StockCode,
OrdMinQty,
CustomerNo,
LocationNo,
Inserttime,
ParentCode,
OptRec,
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{locationno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{parentcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{optrec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.mig_Inventory_agent
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOpenning = #{record.qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyOnHand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyExport = #{record.qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyPrepare = #{record.qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OutDate = #{record.outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OrdMinQty = #{record.ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ParentCode = #{record.parentcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptRec = #{record.optrec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update dbo.mig_Inventory_agent set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyOpenning = #{record.qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyOnHand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyExport = #{record.qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyPrepare = #{record.qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER}, InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OutDate = #{record.outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OrdMinQty = #{record.ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ParentCode = #{record.parentcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptRec = #{record.optrec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update dbo.mig_Inventory_agent set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QtyOpenning = #{record.qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyOnHand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyExport = #{record.qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER}, QtyPrepare = #{record.qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER}, InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OutDate = #{record.outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OrdMinQty = #{record.ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ParentCode = #{record.parentcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
